title: Ancient Vampire
description: You've been undead for quite some time. When you Spout Lore about times long past, take +1.

title: Accursed Vampire
description: You've become a vampire by a curse. Choose a tell for your curse, this counts as another **Weakness** for determining the maximum **Blood** you can hold:
pickOne: Animals become noticeably agitated by your presence
Candles and lanterns flicker when you enter a room
Food and drink sour at any table you are seated at
Those standing next to you feel an unexplainable chill
Plants wither and die when you walk by

title: Recently Turned
description: Your appearance can never become monstrously inhuman. Additionally, you may call upon the elder vampire who sired you for assistance, and he'll help you… for a price.
